hooks: letters from a 1962 lighthouse keeper to his daughter
angles: smallness is the point, not the weakness
format: 3-slide teaser carousel with a long letter-style caption
verbatim: Write the whole week as letters from a 1962 lighthouse keeper to his daughter. Make the caption run long, like a real letter, about 2,200 characters. Just a short 3-slide teaser carousel. No pitch until day 5. Sign it from the light.
